title: Deals Value in Accounts
excerpt: I am curious if there is a way to add a column to accounts that calculate deals value, as we see with the contacts board.

posts.author: TheMrDip (Anthony Francis)
posts.cookedHtml: I am curious if there is a way to add a column to accounts that calculate deals value, as we see with the contacts board.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Add a connected column and then a mirror column to pull the deal value
